## Annotator inter-reliability scores

```{r}

cm3 <- matrix(
  c(62, 12, 2,
    5, 279, 2,
    0,   0, 0),
  nrow = 3, byrow = TRUE,
  dimnames = list(
    final   = c("christian", "non_christian", "question"),
    earlier = c("christian", "non_christian", "question")
  )
)

kappa_from_cm <- function(cm) {
  n <- sum(cm)
  po <- sum(diag(cm)) / n
  pe <- sum(rowSums(cm) * colSums(cm)) / n^2
  (po - pe) / (1 - pe)
}

obs_from_cm <- function(cm) sum(diag(cm)) / sum(cm)

cm2 <- cm3[1:2, 1:2]

n_full <- sum(cm3)
agree_full <- sum(diag(cm3))
disagree_full <- n_full - agree_full
obs_full <- obs_from_cm(cm3)
kappa_full <- kappa_from_cm(cm3)

n_bin <- sum(cm2)
agree_bin <- sum(diag(cm2))
disagree_bin <- n_bin - agree_bin
obs_bin <- obs_from_cm(cm2)
kappa_bin <- kappa_from_cm(cm2)

rec <- diag(cm2) / rowSums(cm2)
prec <- diag(cm2) / colSums(cm2)
f1 <- 2 * prec * rec / (prec + rec)
bal_acc <- mean(rec)
macro_f1 <- mean(f1)

tp <- cm2[1,1]
fn <- cm2[1,2]
fp <- cm2[2,1]
tn <- cm2[2,2]

mcc <- (tp * tn - fp * fn) / sqrt((tp + fp) * (tp + fn) * (tn + fp) * (tn + fn))

stats <- data.frame(
  statistic = c("n", "agreements", "disagreements", "observed_agreement", "kappa", "balanced_accuracy", "macro_f1", "mcc"),
  full_filtered_set = c(n_full, agree_full, disagree_full, obs_full, kappa_full, NA, NA, NA),
  binary_comparable_subset = c(n_bin, agree_bin, disagree_bin, obs_bin, kappa_bin, bal_acc, macro_f1, mcc)
)


cat(sprintf(
"%% table rows\n%d & %d & %d & %.3f & %.3f \\\\\n%d & %d & %d & %.3f & %.3f & %.3f & %.3f & %.3f \\\\\n",
n_full, agree_full, disagree_full, obs_full, kappa_full,
n_bin, agree_bin, disagree_bin, obs_bin, kappa_bin, bal_acc, macro_f1, mcc
))
```
